hero.title: Ancient Wisdom for Modern Life
hero.subtitle: Discover the profound teachings of Chinese metaphysics — I Ching divination, blessed talismans, and sacred rituals to guide your path.

divination.title: I Ching Divination
divination.desc: Ancient oracle wisdom to illuminate your questions about life, career, relationships, and destiny.

talisman.title: Blessed Items & Talismans
talisman.desc: Sacred objects infused with positive energy — customized for your needs or selected from our curated collection.

ritual.title: Ritual Services
ritual.desc: Traditional ceremonies performed by experienced masters to bring harmony, prosperity, and spiritual protection.

philosophy.title: The Way of Harmony
philosophy.desc: Rooted in thousands of years of Chinese philosophical tradition, we believe in the balance of Yin and Yang, the wisdom of the I Ching, and the power of aligned intention. Our mission is to share this cultural heritage with the world.

footer.desc: Reach out to us for guidance, questions, or to schedule a consultation.

services.title: Our Services
services.subtitle: Explore the depth of Chinese metaphysical traditions

intro.title: Who We Are
intro.desc: We are dedicated practitioners and teachers of traditional Chinese metaphysics, committed to sharing the profound wisdom of this ancient culture with the world. Whether you are seeking guidance, protection, or a deeper understanding of the forces that shape your life — we are here to help.

iching.title: I Ching — The Book of Changes
iching.desc: The I Ching is one of the oldest and most revered Chinese classics. Through the casting of hexagrams, it reveals the patterns of change and offers guidance on questions of all kinds.
iching.contactPrompt: Ready to seek guidance? Contact us to schedule a reading.

talisman.title: Blessed Items & Custom Talismans
talisman.desc: Sacred items empowered through traditional rituals to bring protection, prosperity, and positive energy into your life.
talisman.custom: Send us your personal items for a custom blessing ritual
talisman.shop: Browse our curated collection of pre-blessed items

ritual.title: Ritual Ceremonies
ritual.desc: Traditional Taoist and Buddhist-inspired ceremonies performed according to ancient protocols, tailored to your specific needs and circumstances.
ritual.contactPrompt: Contact us to discuss which ceremony best suits your needs.

about.title: About Us
about.subtitle: Bridging ancient wisdom and the modern world

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.desc: We believe that the timeless wisdom of Chinese metaphysics has the power to transform lives. Our mission is to make this cultural heritage accessible to people around the world — regardless of background or belief.

philosophy.title: Our Philosophy
philosophy.desc: At the heart of Chinese metaphysics lies the understanding that all things are connected. The I Ching teaches us to flow with change rather than resist it. The balance of Yin and Yang reveals that harmony comes from embracing opposites. Through rituals and blessings, we align ourselves with the natural forces of the universe.

culture.title: What is Chinese Metaphysics?
culture.desc: Chinese metaphysics (玄学) encompasses a rich system of philosophical and practical traditions including I Ching (易经), Feng Shui (风水), Ba Zi (八字), and spiritual rituals. These practices have been refined over thousands of years and continue to offer profound insights for those seeking guidance and harmony in their lives.
